# Offshore Well

**Summary**: Offshore drilling locations where the study was conducted.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-murif|Murif, 2023]] conducted field tests in three offshore wells with different profiles.

## Geological and Structural Setting

## Key Findings From This Location

- Well-A had a 12.25" intermediate section, while Well-B also had a 12.25" section and Well-C had an 8.5" liner section. ([[2023-murif|Murif, 2023, p. 173]])
